childhood.birthPlace: Atlantic City, New Jersey, United States
childhood.familyBackground: Family with food service background. Father was restaurant and sandwich shop owner.
childhood.familyBackgroundKo: 음식 서빙 배경의 가족. 아버지는 레스토랑 및 샌드위치 가게 소유자였음.
childhood.education: High school education, apprenticeship in family food business
childhood.educationKo: 고등학교 교육, 가족 음식 사업의 도제 교육
childhood.earlyLife: Grew up in family sandwich and food service business. Started working in family business as teenager.
childhood.earlyLifeKo: 가족 샌드위치 및 음식 서빙 사업 속에서 성장. 십 대 때 가족 사업에서 일하기 시작.

careerTimeline.event: Took over family sandwich shop in Atlantic City
careerTimeline.eventKo: 애틀란틱 시티의 가족 샌드위치 가게 인수

careerTimeline.event: Founded Jersey Mike's Subs franchise system
careerTimeline.eventKo: Jersey Mike's Subs 프랜차이즈 시스템 설립

careerTimeline.event: Expanded Jersey Mike's to hundreds of locations
careerTimeline.eventKo: Jersey Mike's를 수백 개 지점으로 확대

careerTimeline.event: Sold majority stake while remaining leader

personalTraits.knownFor: Founder of Jersey Mike's Subs, building major submarine sandwich franchise empire. Known for commitment to quality and family-friendly business values.
personalTraits.knownForKo: Jersey Mike's Subs 창립자, 주요 서브마린 샌드위치 프랜차이즈 제국 구축. 품질 및 가족 친화적 비즈니스 가치에 대한 헌신으로 알려짐.
personalTraits.philanthropy: Supports food industry education and community initiatives
personalTraits.philanthropyKo: 음식 산업 교육 및 커뮤니티 이니셔티브 지원
